title: Plan and implement a chemical use program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a chemical use program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify requirements for chemical use

pcs.text: Identify, source and interpret information required for planning and implementing a chemical use program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source and interpret information required for planning and implementing a chemical use program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source and interpret information required for planning and implementing a chemical use program.

pcs.text: Assess the need for chemical use as an option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the need for chemical use as an option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the need for chemical use as an option.

pcs.text: Ensure that personnel are adequately trained in chemical use according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that personnel are adequately trained in chemical use according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that personnel are adequately trained in chemical use according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify requirements for chemical use

elements.title: Assess risks and develop control procedures

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and develop control measures and emergency action plans for chemical use operational activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and develop control measures and emergency action plans for chemical use operational activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and develop control measures and emergency action plans for chemical use operational activities.

pcs.text: Assess weather conditions and forecasts to determine implications for off target contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess weather conditions and forecasts to determine implications for off target contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess weather conditions and forecasts to determine implications for off target contamination.

pcs.text: Assess the sensitivity of target area and impact of chemical on the environment according to chemical label instructions and safety data sheets (SDS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the sensitivity of target area and impact of chemical on the environment according to chemical label instructions and safety data sheets (SDS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the sensitivity of target area and impact of chemical on the environment according to chemical label instructions and safety data sheets (SDS).

pcs.text: Assess the risk to human and animal health according to chemical label instructions and SDS
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the risk to human and animal health according to chemical label instructions and SDS?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the risk to human and animal health according to chemical label instructions and SDS.

pcs.text: Analyse assessments and document risk control procedures for the chemical application plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse assessments and document risk control procedures for the chemical application plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse assessments and document risk control procedures for the chemical application plan according to workplace procedures.

common_gaps_or_errors: Unable to specify workplace-relevant requirements or conditions

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of monitor adherence to procedures for handling, transport, storage, decontamination and disposal of chemicals according to chemical application plan
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor adherence to procedures for handling, transport, storage, decontamination and disposal of chemicals according to chemical application plan.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
